ValidationRule.description: Do not allow future insolvency date
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: If( ISNEW(), (AND(OR(ISNULL( CreatedDate ),ISBLANK(CreatedDate )),IF(( ((ISNEW()) || (!ISNEW() && ISCHANGED(Insolvency_Date__c))) && (!ISNULL(Insolvency_Date__c )) && (Insolvency_Date__c > TODAY()) ), true, false))), IF(( ((ISNEW()) || (!ISNEW() && ISCHANGED(Insolvency_Date__c))) && (!ISNULL(Insolvency_Date__c )) && (Insolvency_Date__c > TODAY()) ), true, false))
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Insolvency Date cannot be in future
